reviews.review_description: I need more applications like this

reviews.review_title: great app for all flight enthusiast!
reviews.review_description: The app is very good for people with fear of flight because give to them the opportunity to see all plane exterior and understand the aircraft systems. It is not for person looking for the sim. Maybe will be available a second app with the cockpit and interior of the plane. Great job!
Looking for refund as soon as possible, I thought I was getting some form of flight simulator and not just looking at planes
